title: InstantShield
description: An shield delay removal system developed for Minecraft servers. Removes the default 5-tick shield warm-up delay and supports Folia and all modern server software.
body:
# 🛡️ InstantShield

An **shield delay removal system** developed for Minecraft servers.  
Removes the default **5-tick (0.25s) shield warm-up delay** and supports **Folia** and all modern server software.

![InstantShield](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/onurrrk/InstantShield/refs/heads/main/InstantShield.gif)

## 🚀 Features

### ⚡ Zero Delay (Instant Block)
- Instantly activates the shield on right-click.
- Provides true reflex-based blocking during PvP.
- Completely bypasses the vanilla shield warm-up delay.

### 🧠 Optimized Performance
- Lightweight and efficient implementation.
- No unnecessary calculations or TPS loss.
- Safe for high-performance and high-player servers.

### ⚙️ Fully Configurable
- Can be enabled or disabled instantly via `config.yml`.

## ⚙️ Configuration

InstantShield is **enabled by default**.  
You can configure the plugin via `config.yml`:

```yaml
# InstantShield Configuration
instant-shield-enabled: true
```

## ⚙️ Supported Forks

| Fork / Build | Support Status  |
|--------------|----------------|
| ✅ Paper     | Fully Supported |
| ✅ Purpur    | Fully Supported |
| ✅ Spigot    | Fully Supported |
| ✅ Folia     | Fully Supported |
| ✅ Bukkit    | Fully Supported |
